a1064d02a408.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
a1064d02a408.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
a1064d02a408.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

d0b7e291b938.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
d0b7e291b938.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

857d82904b7e.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
857d82904b7e.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
857d82904b7e.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.
